data.content: Implementation review approved. All 4 children advanced to ready_for_shipment. Combined changes across parent branch (feat/knots-a9e6-owner-artifact-metadata) and child branch (knots-3239-profile-delivery-targets) satisfy all 6 acceptance criteria: (1) Skills and loom prompts updated with output-mode-specific language. (2) No-PR profiles (autopilot, semiauto, *_no_planning) no longer reference PR artifacts in rendered prompts. (3) PR profiles explicitly target PR inspection. (4) Delivery targets are deterministic via resolve_output_specific_sections and per-profile rendering in compatibility.rs. (5) Human-gated semiauto variants preserve gate points unchanged. (6) Comprehensive tests assert prompt content per profile, human gate preservation, and delivery target correctness. Tests pass on both branches (799 tests, 95.07% coverage on child). No merge conflicts between branches.
